title: millettia pulchra var. microphylla
intro: Millettia pulchra var. microphylla, also known as the small-leafed milk bush, is a plant species in the legume family, Fabaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are attributed to the presence of various bioactive compounds such as flavonoids and terpenoids. The plant is believed to offer several health benefits, including the treatment of wounds, fever, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve immune function. In traditional medicine, Millettia pulchra var. microphylla is often prepared as a decoction or infusion by boiling the leaves and stems in water to create a herbal remedy.
